title: Plan a field or endpoint deprecation
description: A procedure to retire part of the contract without breaking clients, through announcement, overlap, and monitored removal.
body: Use when a field or endpoint must be removed or replaced. Do not delete it outright from a live version. Steps: mark the element deprecated in the spec with a successor and timeline; keep the old and new paths working in parallel; monitor usage of the deprecated element; remove only after usage drops or the version is retired. Validation signals include clients migrating before removal and telemetry showing the deprecated path unused. Risk boundary: removing a field clients still call breaks them, so gate removal on observed disuse and a communicated timeline.
